name: sim_clifford_deep_cl3_rotor_double_cover

pytorch.reason: not needed; pure GA identities, no autograd

pyg.reason: not needed; no graph structure in rotor identities

z3.reason: GA identities are over reals with transcendental angles; SMT not suitable here

cvc5.reason: same as z3 -- transcendental rotor angles out of scope

sympy.reason: symbolic GA would duplicate clifford's numeric proof; kept as supportive option only

geomstats.reason: geomstats SO(3) would be numpy-matrix mimicry; deliberately not used

e3nn.reason: e3nn Wigner-D is matrix form; we test rotor form directly

positive.blocker: clifford not importable: ImportError('ablated import: clifford')

negative.blocker: clifford not importable: ImportError('ablated import: clifford')

boundary.blocker: clifford not importable: ImportError('ablated import: clifford')

identities_proved: SU(2)->SO(3) double cover: R and -R induce identical vector rotation
Rotor exponential: exp(-B*theta/2) composition about same axis is additive in angle
Pseudoscalar I=e1e2e3 flips grade parity (chirality) on odd multivectors
